task:
A few issues:

1- On the map, currently, in combined tracks mode there is a time slider, but on one track details there s not. Can we have the timeslider always to be visual? 
2- the blue circle seems to spin all the time, even when all data is loaded.
3- in one track detail mode, the "back to combined tracks" button should be a simpler smaller button (maybe onl back symbol and a hover tool tip with a "back to combined tracks" text?) and next to the time slder (see item 1 of this list).
user_feedback_text:
A few issues:

1- On the map, currently, in combined tracks mode there is a time slider, but on one track details there s not. Can we have the timeslider always to be visual? 
2- the blue circle seems to spin all the time, even when all data is loaded.
3- in one track detail mode, the "back to combined tracks" button should be a simpler smaller button (maybe onl back symbol and a hover tool tip with a "back to combined tracks" text?) and next to the time slder (see item 1 of this list).
